boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Insurance claims / coverage controls action now? Action: prior authorization approved inside active policy and procedure code. Boundary: provider request cannot override policy code.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The source control record does not close the exact boundary because the policy active date and procedure code match remains unresolved. Provider request text cannot override policy code. Escalation is required until the controlling source records verify the exact dependency.
